ArrayParameterType.name: Svc|ComQueueDepth
ArrayParameterType.shortDescription: Array of queue depths for Fw::Com types

ArrayParameterType.name: Svc|BuffQueueDepth
ArrayParameterType.shortDescription: Array of queue depths for Fw::Buffer types

EnumeratedParameterType.name: Svc|QueueType
EnumeratedParameterType.shortDescription: An enumeration of queue data types

IntegerParameterType.name: PlatformSizeType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The unsigned type of larger sizes internal to the software, e.g., memory buffer sizes, file sizes. Must be unsigned. Supplied by platform, overridable by project.

IntegerParameterType.name: FwIndexType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The type of smaller indices internal to the software, used for array indices, e.g., port indices. Must be signed.

IntegerParameterType.name: FwTlmPacketizeIdType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The type of a telemetry packet identifier

IntegerParameterType.name: FwOpcodeType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The type of a command opcode

IntegerParameterType.name: FwPacketDescriptorType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The width of packet descriptors when they are serialized by the framework

EnumeratedParameterType.name: ComCfg|Apid
EnumeratedParameterType.shortDescription: APIDs are 11 bits in the Space Packet protocol, so we use U16. Max value 7FF

Enumeration.label: SPP_IDLE_PACKET
Enumeration.shortDescription: Per Space Packet Standard, all 1s (11bits) is reserved for Idle Packets

Enumeration.label: INVALID_UNINITIALIZED
Enumeration.shortDescription: Anything equal or higher value is invalid and should not be used

EnumeratedParameterType.name: Svc|CmdSequencer|FileReadStage
EnumeratedParameterType.shortDescription: The stage of the file read operation

IntegerParameterType.name: FwPrmIdType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The type of a parameter identifier

Enumeration.label: PARTIAL
Enumeration.shortDescription: The partially transmitted state A data product is in this state from the start of transmission until transmission is complete.

IntegerParameterType.name: FwDpPriorityType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The type of a data product priority

IntegerParameterType.name: PlatformIndexType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The type of smaller indices internal to the software, used for array indices, e.g., port indices. Must be signed.

EnumeratedParameterType.name: Svc|EventManager|FilterSeverity
EnumeratedParameterType.shortDescription: Severity level for event filtering Similar to Fw::LogSeverity, but no FATAL event

IntegerParameterType.name: FwChanIdType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The type of a telemetry channel identifier

Enumeration.label: USER_BUFFER
Enumeration.shortDescription: Buffer allocation for user handled buffer

IntegerParameterType.name: FwTimeContextStoreType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The type used to serialize a time context value

EnumeratedParameterType.name: Svc|VersionEnabled
EnumeratedParameterType.shortDescription: Tracks versions for project, framework and user defined versions etc

AggregateParameterType.name: Svc|DpRecord
AggregateParameterType.shortDescription: Data structure representing a data product.

EnumeratedParameterType.name: Svc|VersionCfg|VersionEnum
EnumeratedParameterType.shortDescription: Define a set of Version entries on a project-specific basis.

IntegerParameterType.name: FwDpIdType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The type of a data product identifier

EnumeratedParameterType.name: Fw|DpCfg|ProcType
EnumeratedParameterType.shortDescription: A bit mask for selecting the type of processing to perform on a container before writing it to disk.

EnumeratedParameterType.name: TimeBase
EnumeratedParameterType.shortDescription: Define enumeration for Time base types

Enumeration.label: TB_NONE
Enumeration.shortDescription: No time base has been established (Required)

Enumeration.label: TB_PROC_TIME
Enumeration.shortDescription: Indicates time is processor cycle time. Not tied to external time

Enumeration.label: TB_WORKSTATION_TIME
Enumeration.shortDescription: Time as reported on workstation where software is running. For testing. (Required)

Enumeration.label: TB_SC_TIME
Enumeration.shortDescription: Time as reported by the spacecraft clock.

Enumeration.label: TB_DONT_CARE
Enumeration.shortDescription: Don't care value for sequences. If FwTimeBaseStoreType is changed, value should be changed (Required)

IntegerParameterType.name: FwSizeType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The unsigned type of larger sizes internal to the software, e.g., memory buffer sizes, file sizes. Must be unsigned.

IntegerParameterType.name: FwSizeStoreType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The type used to serialize a size value

EnumeratedParameterType.name: Svc|PrmDb|PrmDbFileLoadState
EnumeratedParameterType.shortDescription: State of parameter DB file load operations

Enumeration.label: BUFFER_EMPTY
Enumeration.shortDescription: Deserialization buffer was empty when trying to read data

Enumeration.label: FORMAT_ERROR
Enumeration.shortDescription: Deserialization data had incorrect values (unexpected data types)

Enumeration.label: SIZE_MISMATCH
Enumeration.shortDescription: Data was left in in the buffer, but not enough to deserialize

Member.name: timeContext
Member.shortDescription: user settable value. Could be reboot count, node, etc

EnumeratedParameterType.name: Fw|Wait
EnumeratedParameterType.shortDescription: Wait or don't wait for something

AggregateParameterType.name: Svc|CustomVersionDb
AggregateParameterType.shortDescription: Data Structure for custom version Tlm

IntegerParameterType.name: FwTimeBaseStoreType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The type used to serialize a time base value

IntegerParameterType.name: FwEventIdType
IntegerParameterType.shortDescription: The type of an event identifier

Parameter.name: CdhCore|cmdDisp|CommandsDropped
Parameter.shortDescription: Number of commands drooped due to buffer overflow

Parameter.name: ComCcsds|comQueue|comQueueDepth
Parameter.shortDescription: Depth of queues of Fw::ComBuffer type

Parameter.name: ComCcsds|comQueue|buffQueueDepth
Parameter.shortDescription: Depth of queues of Fw::Buffer type

Parameter.name: ComCcsds|commsBufferManager|CurrBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The current number of allocated buffers

Parameter.name: ComCcsds|commsBufferManager|HiBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The high water mark of allocated buffers

Parameter.name: ComCcsds|commsBufferManager|NoBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of requests that couldn't return a buffer

Parameter.name: ComCcsds|commsBufferManager|EmptyBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of empty buffers returned

Parameter.name: DataProducts|dpCat|CatalogDps
Parameter.shortDescription: Number of data products in catalog

Parameter.name: DataProducts|dpMgr|NumSuccessfulAllocations
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of successful buffer allocations

Parameter.name: DataProducts|dpMgr|NumFailedAllocations
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of failed buffer allocations

Parameter.name: DataProducts|dpBufferManager|CurrBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The current number of allocated buffers

Parameter.name: DataProducts|dpBufferManager|HiBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The high water mark of allocated buffers

Parameter.name: DataProducts|dpBufferManager|NoBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of requests that couldn't return a buffer

Parameter.name: DataProducts|dpBufferManager|EmptyBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of empty buffers returned

Parameter.name: FileHandling|fileUplink|FilesReceived
Parameter.shortDescription: The total number of complete files received

Parameter.name: FileHandling|fileUplink|PacketsReceived
Parameter.shortDescription: The total number of packets received

Parameter.name: FileHandling|fileUplink|Warnings
Parameter.shortDescription: The total number of warnings issued

Parameter.name: FileHandling|fileDownlink|FilesSent
Parameter.shortDescription: The total number of files sent

Parameter.name: FileHandling|fileDownlink|PacketsSent
Parameter.shortDescription: The total number of packets sent

Parameter.name: FileHandling|fileManager|CommandsExecuted
Parameter.shortDescription: The total number of commands successfully executed

Parameter.name: FprimeYamcsReference|cmdSeq|CS_LoadCommands
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of Load commands executed

Parameter.name: FprimeYamcsReference|cmdSeq|CS_CancelCommands
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of Cancel commands executed

Parameter.name: FprimeYamcsReference|cmdSeq|CS_Errors
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of errors that have occurred

Parameter.name: FprimeYamcsReference|cmdSeq|CS_CommandsExecuted
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of commands executed across all sequences.

ArrayArgumentType.name: Svc|ComQueueDepth
ArrayArgumentType.shortDescription: Array of queue depths for Fw::Com types

ArrayArgumentType.name: Svc|BuffQueueDepth
ArrayArgumentType.shortDescription: Array of queue depths for Fw::Buffer types

EnumeratedArgumentType.name: Svc|QueueType
EnumeratedArgumentType.shortDescription: An enumeration of queue data types

IntegerArgumentType.name: PlatformSizeType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The unsigned type of larger sizes internal to the software, e.g., memory buffer sizes, file sizes. Must be unsigned. Supplied by platform, overridable by project.

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwIndexType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The type of smaller indices internal to the software, used for array indices, e.g., port indices. Must be signed.

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwTlmPacketizeIdType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The type of a telemetry packet identifier

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwOpcodeType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The type of a command opcode

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwPacketDescriptorType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The width of packet descriptors when they are serialized by the framework

EnumeratedArgumentType.name: ComCfg|Apid
EnumeratedArgumentType.shortDescription: APIDs are 11 bits in the Space Packet protocol, so we use U16. Max value 7FF

Enumeration.label: SPP_IDLE_PACKET
Enumeration.shortDescription: Per Space Packet Standard, all 1s (11bits) is reserved for Idle Packets

Enumeration.label: INVALID_UNINITIALIZED
Enumeration.shortDescription: Anything equal or higher value is invalid and should not be used

EnumeratedArgumentType.name: Svc|CmdSequencer|FileReadStage
EnumeratedArgumentType.shortDescription: The stage of the file read operation

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwPrmIdType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The type of a parameter identifier

Enumeration.label: PARTIAL
Enumeration.shortDescription: The partially transmitted state A data product is in this state from the start of transmission until transmission is complete.

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwDpPriorityType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The type of a data product priority

IntegerArgumentType.name: PlatformIndexType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The type of smaller indices internal to the software, used for array indices, e.g., port indices. Must be signed.

EnumeratedArgumentType.name: Svc|EventManager|FilterSeverity
EnumeratedArgumentType.shortDescription: Severity level for event filtering Similar to Fw::LogSeverity, but no FATAL event

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwChanIdType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The type of a telemetry channel identifier

Enumeration.label: USER_BUFFER
Enumeration.shortDescription: Buffer allocation for user handled buffer

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwTimeContextStoreType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The type used to serialize a time context value

EnumeratedArgumentType.name: Svc|VersionEnabled
EnumeratedArgumentType.shortDescription: Tracks versions for project, framework and user defined versions etc

AggregateArgumentType.name: Svc|DpRecord
AggregateArgumentType.shortDescription: Data structure representing a data product.

EnumeratedArgumentType.name: Svc|VersionCfg|VersionEnum
EnumeratedArgumentType.shortDescription: Define a set of Version entries on a project-specific basis.

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwDpIdType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The type of a data product identifier

EnumeratedArgumentType.name: Fw|DpCfg|ProcType
EnumeratedArgumentType.shortDescription: A bit mask for selecting the type of processing to perform on a container before writing it to disk.

EnumeratedArgumentType.name: TimeBase
EnumeratedArgumentType.shortDescription: Define enumeration for Time base types

Enumeration.label: TB_NONE
Enumeration.shortDescription: No time base has been established (Required)

Enumeration.label: TB_PROC_TIME
Enumeration.shortDescription: Indicates time is processor cycle time. Not tied to external time

Enumeration.label: TB_WORKSTATION_TIME
Enumeration.shortDescription: Time as reported on workstation where software is running. For testing. (Required)

Enumeration.label: TB_SC_TIME
Enumeration.shortDescription: Time as reported by the spacecraft clock.

Enumeration.label: TB_DONT_CARE
Enumeration.shortDescription: Don't care value for sequences. If FwTimeBaseStoreType is changed, value should be changed (Required)

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwSizeType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The unsigned type of larger sizes internal to the software, e.g., memory buffer sizes, file sizes. Must be unsigned.

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwSizeStoreType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The type used to serialize a size value

EnumeratedArgumentType.name: Svc|PrmDb|PrmDbFileLoadState
EnumeratedArgumentType.shortDescription: State of parameter DB file load operations

Enumeration.label: BUFFER_EMPTY
Enumeration.shortDescription: Deserialization buffer was empty when trying to read data

Enumeration.label: FORMAT_ERROR
Enumeration.shortDescription: Deserialization data had incorrect values (unexpected data types)

Enumeration.label: SIZE_MISMATCH
Enumeration.shortDescription: Data was left in in the buffer, but not enough to deserialize

Member.name: timeContext
Member.shortDescription: user settable value. Could be reboot count, node, etc

EnumeratedArgumentType.name: Fw|Wait
EnumeratedArgumentType.shortDescription: Wait or don't wait for something

AggregateArgumentType.name: Svc|CustomVersionDb
AggregateArgumentType.shortDescription: Data Structure for custom version Tlm

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwTimeBaseStoreType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The type used to serialize a time base value

IntegerArgumentType.name: FwEventIdType
IntegerArgumentType.shortDescription: The type of an event identifier
